summary:
Yeast prions model core mechanisms like templated protein misfolding and aggregate spread seen in human amyloid diseases such as Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s. These findings support their use as accessible systems to understand pathogenic processes common across diverse neurodegenerative disorders.
